content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use a forward counter with a `while` loop to simulate a robot charging process. The loop counts from the user-entered value to `100%` and displays the progress in a clean and readable format.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Charging... 96%
Charging... 97%
Charging... 98%
Charging... 99%
Charging... 100%
Robot fully charged!
